mapper.select: SELECT * FROM column_info WHERE table_id = #{tableId} AND is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY id ASC
mapper.update: UPDATE column_info SET column_custom_comment = #{columnCustomComment}, updated_at = datetime('now') WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE column_info SET is_deleted = 1, updated_at = datetime('now') WHERE table_id = #{tableId}
UPDATE column_info SET is_deleted = 1, updated_at = datetime('now') WHERE id = #{id}
